name: Which schema should I use for AEO content: FAQPage, HowTo, or Article?
description: Choose schema based on the page type. FAQPage fits Q&A content, HowTo fits step-by-step instructions, and Article fits editorial or educational pages.

mainEntity.name: Which schema should I use for AEO content: FAQPage, HowTo, or Article?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your page is meant to answer one clear question, FAQPage schema is often the best fit. For step-by-step instructions, use HowTo; for editorial or educational content, Article; and for company identity, Organization helps answer engines connect your brand across the site.
acceptedAnswer.description: Choose schema based on the page type. FAQPage fits Q&A content, HowTo fits step-by-step instructions, and Article fits editorial or educational pages.
